entity: College of Engineering, University of California, Berkeley

entity: Wason Medal for Most Meritorious Paper
explicit_text: One of the highlights of my academic career was receiving the Wason Medal for Most Meritorious Paper alongside my colleague Boris Bresler. This award recognized our research contributions in structural mechanics and viscoelasticity. It was a proud moment that reflected the hard work and collaboration we invested in our projects.
